mapper.select:
SELECT p.fxtm_pbls_data_oid, p.fxtm_pbls_data_ttl, p.aut, p.page_num, p.pblcn_dt, p.inq_cnt, p.cvr_img1_oid, f1.strg_file_path AS cover_file_path, f1.strg_file_nm AS cover_file_name, f1.orgnl_file_nm AS cover_origin_file_name, p.cvr_img2_oid, f2.strg_file_path AS full_file_path, f2.strg_file_nm AS full_file_name, f2.orgnl_file_nm AS full_origin_file_name, f2.file_type_nm AS full_file_ext FROM ${schema}.fxtm_pbls_data p LEFT JOIN ${schema}.file f1 ON p.cvr_img1_oid = f1.file_oid AND f1.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ${schema}.file f2 ON p.cvr_img2_oid = f2.file_oid AND f2.use_yn = 'Y'
p.use_yn = 'Y' AND p.open_yn = 'Y'
AND p.fxtm_pbls_data_ttl LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND p.aut LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND (p.fxtm_pbls_data_ttl LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR p.aut LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY p.pblcn_dt DESC, p.fxtm_pbls_data_oid DESC

SELECT p.fxtm_pbls_data_oid, p.fxtm_pbls_data_ttl, p.aut, p.page_num, p.pblcn_dt, p.inq_cnt, p.cvr_img1_oid, f.strg_file_path AS cover_file_path, f.strg_file_nm AS cover_file_name, f.orgnl_file_nm AS cover_origin_file_name FROM ${schema}.fxtm_pbls_data p LEFT JOIN ${schema}.file f ON p.cvr_img1_oid = f.file_oid AND f.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE p.fxtm_pbls_data_oid = #{fxtmPblsDataOid} AND p.use_yn = 'Y' AND p.open_yn = 'Y'

SELECT f.file_oid, f.strg_file_path, f.strg_file_nm, f.orgnl_file_nm, f.file_type_nm, f.strg_file_cpct, f.dwnld_cnt, 'COVER' AS file_type FROM ${schema}.fxtm_pbls_data p INNER JOIN ${schema}.file f ON p.cvr_img1_oid = f.file_oid AND f.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE p.fxtm_pbls_data_oid = #{fxtmPblsDataOid} AND p.use_yn = 'Y' AND p.open_yn = 'Y' AND p.cvr_img1_oid IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT f.file_oid, f.strg_file_path, f.strg_file_nm, f.orgnl_file_nm, f.file_type_nm, f.strg_file_cpct, f.dwnld_cnt, 'FULL' AS file_type FROM ${schema}.fxtm_pbls_data p INNER JOIN ${schema}.file f ON p.cvr_img2_oid = f.file_oid AND f.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE p.fxtm_pbls_data_oid = #{fxtmPblsDataOid} AND p.use_yn = 'Y' AND p.open_yn = 'Y' AND p.cvr_img2_oid IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY file_type DESC
SELECT fxtm_pbls_sect_oid, fxtm_pbls_sect_type, fxtm_pbls_sect_ttl FROM ${schema}.fxtm_pbls_sect WHERE fxtm_pbls_data_oid = #{fxtmPblsDataOid} ORDER BY sort_seq, fxtm_pbls_sect_oid

SELECT i.fxtm_pbls_item_ttl, i.aut, i.page_num, i.atch_file_oid, f.strg_file_path AS attach_file_path, f.strg_file_nm AS attach_file_name, f.orgnl_file_nm AS attach_origin_file_name FROM ${schema}.fxtm_pbls_item i LEFT JOIN ${schema}.file f ON i.atch_file_oid = f.file_oid AND f.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE i.fxtm_pbls_sect_oid = #{fxtmPblsSectOid} ORDER BY i.sort_seq, i.fxtm_pbls_item_oid
SELECT fxtm_pbls_data_oid, fxtm_pbls_data_ttl FROM ${schema}.fxtm_pbls_data WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND open_yn = 'Y' AND fxtm_pbls_data_oid < #{fxtmPblsDataOid} ORDER BY fxtm_pbls_data_oid DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT fxtm_pbls_data_oid, fxtm_pbls_data_ttl FROM ${schema}.fxtm_pbls_data WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND open_yn = 'Y' AND fxtm_pbls_data_oid > #{fxtmPblsDataOid} ORDER BY fxtm_pbls_data_oid ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE ${schema}.fxtm_pbls_data SET inq_cnt = inq_cnt + 1, mdfcn_dt = NOW() WHERE fxtm_pbls_data_oid = #{fxtmPblsDataOid}
